title: More Nonsense Limerick 15
content:
There was an old man of the Dargle
    Who purchased six barrels of Gargle;
    For he said, "I'll sit still, 
    And will roll them down hill,
    For the fish in the depths of the Dargle."
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 15" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
